text:
-----BEGIN PGP SIGNED MESSAGE-----
Hash: SHA1

This bug has been laying dormant for quite some time, and dwm in ports
is now in v4.7. I don't intend to support this any longer (reads: I'll
not keep updating the patches to apply cleanly for newer versions of the
dwm port and just watch them sit in a PR), so I'm totally ok with
closing this PR if the maintainer is also ok with it.

\n\n
